evals.name: add-new-link
evals.prompt: Add a new shortlink to links.json: 'yt' pointing to 'https://youtube.com'
evals.expected_output: The links.json file should contain the key 'yt' with value 'https://youtube.com'

evals.name: delete-link
evals.expected_output: The 'old-docs' key should be removed from links.json

evals.name: validate-file
evals.prompt: Check if our shortlinks in links.json are valid.
evals.expected_output: The skill should confirm the file is valid or point out errors.

evals.name: sort-links
evals.prompt: Sort the links in links.json alphabetically.
evals.expected_output: The keys in links.json should be in alphabetical order.
